name: LOL: Last One Laughing Thailand
original_name: LOL: หัวเราะทีหลังปังกว่า
overview: Oat Pramote and C Siwat host 10 of the biggest Thai comedians in a community mall for 6 hours. To eliminate their fellow comedians, they can do anything to make each other laugh, except laugh themselves. With 1 million baht on the line for a charity of their choice, who will be the Last One Laughing?

trailers.title: LOL: Last One Laughing Thailand หัวเราะทีหลังปังกว่า - ตัวอย่างอย่างเป็นทางการ | Prime Thailand
